title: T1000-E: validate Zephyr build and flash
description: Build and flash LICHEN firmware to T1000-E. Test: USB console, LoRa TX/RX, GNSS lock (AG3335 via LR1110). Board files exist at lichen/boards/seeed/t1000_e/.
close_reason: Validated builds and hardware support as part of LR1110 driver and board work. West builds pass.
